center.name: 巴倫支海
center.summary: 巴倫支海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白颊黑雁，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | title=Impacts of highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) on a Barnacle Goose Branta leucopsis population wintering on the Solway Firth, UK | journal=Bird Study | date=2025-02-07 | issn=0006-3657 | doi=10.1080/00063657.2024.2443225 | pages=1–12| doi-access=free }} * Breeding on Novaya Zemlya, Dolgy Island, Kanin Peninsula, Yugorsky Peninsula and the Barents Sea coastline in the Russian Arctic, wintering in the Wadden Sea area in southwest Denmark, northwest Germany and the Netherlands
